rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Fam. Code §264.402, which governs establishment of children's advocacy centers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 264.402. ESTABLISHMENT OF CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns children's advocacy centers, wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
